'''thapobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:heading|heading]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-p-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:heading|heading]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| thapobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæpebeth|thæpebeth]] || [[word:thæpebej|thæpebej]] || [[word:thæpebesh|thæpebesh]] || [[word:thæpebe|thæpebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thapopoboth|thapopoboth]] || [[word:thapopoboj|thapopoboj]] || [[word:thapopobosh|thapopobosh]] || [[word:thapopobo|thapopobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapoboth|thapoboth]] || [[word:thapoboj|thapoboj]] || [[word:thapobosh|thapobosh]] || [[word:thapobo|thapobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapofboth|thapofboth]] || [[word:thapofboj|thapofboj]] || [[word:thapofbosh|thapofbosh]] || [[word:thapofbof|thapofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thapobotho|thapobotho]] || [[word:thapobojo|thapobojo]] || [[word:thapobosho|thapobosho]] || [[word:thapoboko|thapoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thapoboth|thapoboth]] || [[word:thapoboj|thapoboj]] || [[word:thapobosh|thapobosh]] || [[word:thapobo|thapobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thapobothol|thapobothol]] || [[word:thapobojol|thapobojol]] || [[word:thapoboshol|thapoboshol]] || [[word:thapobokol|thapobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thapobothotho|thapobothotho]] || [[word:thapobojojo|thapobojojo]] || [[word:thapoboshosho|thapoboshosho]] || [[word:thapoboko|thapoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thapobothon|thapobothon]] || [[word:thapobojon|thapobojon]] || [[word:thapoboshon|thapoboshon]] || [[word:thapobokon|thapobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thapobothoro|thapobothoro]] || [[word:thapobojoro|thapobojoro]] || [[word:thapoboshoro|thapoboshoro]] || [[word:thapobokoro|thapobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
